name: Luca Marlowe
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Luca felt like he escaped being the background character of your perfect world when you guys started dating.

Except he unfortunately didn’t..

It was about time something inside him snapped and told you about it. Even if ‘telling’ you was more sobbing halfway through sex.

Popular user x nerd char

different style for this image and future images since the model I used before doesn’t work anymore :((

Still need to work on a Randy alt.. I just need to know what you guys would want since I can’t come up with anything myself.

Throwing the whole mix of smut-fluff-angst in the tags since I got no clue what it could be specifically. Don’t kill me for this

I don’t think I have anything else to yap about rn 😞 might update if I remember anything
